sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Vantung la ngaihpi hong ging suk hi;
A la dawng lah la ngaih mahmah,

sections.label: Chorus
lines: A sangbel ah minthang hen aw,
Lei-ah mite tung nopna om hen,
Khangsawnte’n tuu bang cing hen aw,

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Vantung mite’ thu puak za uh hi;
Huih lak khempeuh thawnin la kisa.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Leitbat lauhuai loh ding hong paizo;
